When BRICK_DASHBOARD_SA_KEY_PATH is present, _dashboard_projection_headers attaches Authorization from _dashboard_iap_authorization_header; absent env leaves only Content-Type and x-ingest-secret.

_dashboard_iap_authorization_header reads client_email, private_key_id, and private_key from the local key JSON path, builds RS256 JWT header/claims with aud equal to the supplied ingest URL, iat now, exp now+600, and signs via openssl dgst -sha256 -sign over a temp key file.
